name: Jeremy Ring
subject: "So what does a CFO do anyway?"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/0TITudezWi4kheO7AxkvLxXVMV8jqUTPPyCRCPOb0TM=/Eps31oil5j4JOzzZPGY3JQKNsuO_8EgJ9Kcw3q0zQ-4=) Friends and Neighbors -- Florida's Chief Financial Officer is rarely in the headlines. In fact, many Floridians aren't aware that the state has a CFO or that they are an elected official -- something that we learned first hand as we have traveled from the Keys to the Panhandle. I am also painfully aware that talking about the roles and responsibilities of the CFO is not the most exciting topic, but it is important. So, in the most efficient way possible without causing everyone's eyes to glaze over, **here is a breakdown of the the CFO 's responsibilities:** \- Oversees the state accounting functions \- Oversight of the state auditing functions \- Oversight of the states unclaimed properties \- Monitors the investments of state funds \- Manages the deferred compensation program \- Manages the risk management program for the state \- Oversight of the Insurance Consumer Service \- Oversight of the insurance agents and agencies and responsible for insurance licensing \- Oversight of licensing and regulations for funeral homes and cemeteries \- Oversight of insurance fraud investigation \- Ensuring businesses have workers compensation coverage \- Assisting injured workers with benefits and re-employment \- Serves as the state fire marshal. [Help Jeremy Get to the Cabinet. Chip in $3.](https://act.myngp.com/el/0TITudezWi4kheO7AxkvLxXVMV8jqUTPPyCRCPOb0TM=/eXtTAde2kRTmvsv2Z2C30hVSIghWR3av8eh_-hP_GJs=?am=3&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) On top of all of this, the CFO -- along with the Governor, Attorney General, and the Agriculture Commissioner -- serves on the Florida Cabinet, which has the following role in our state government: \- Governing the purchase of state lands \- Serve as the state Clemency Board \- Governing the purchase of state bonds \- Fiduciary trustee for the Florida Retirement System \- Oversight of the state Veterans' Affairs \- Oversight of State Law Enforcement \- Oversight of power plants and transmission line citings \- Financial and insurance regulation for the state Needless to say, the CFO wears a lot of hats and in the coming weeks we will be expanding on many of these responsibilities to convey how consequential this role is to EVERY Floridian. Now more than ever, Tallahassee needs an innovative leader who will be a check-and-balance in the cabinet -- and as your next CFO that is _EXACTLY_ what I intend to do. **But I have to get there first.** [**Can you contribute $3 or more today to help us win this thing - and bring much needed change to the cabinet?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/0TITudezWi4kheO7AxkvLxXVMV8jqUTPPyCRCPOb0TM=/eXtTAde2kRTmvsv2Z2C30hVSIghWR3av8eh_-hP_GJs=?am=3&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thank you for all of your support, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

name: The White House
subject: Tax cuts, jobs, and optimism in the heartland
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=756a8339d602cd6639c5a6c5f8687439906e9ae75ca2f441d00b5dd7575876e61a8f34efb7e2383c7f9ab255de6ca552e169d046e8a3a106) The White House • April 19, 2018
## Driving the Day
President Donald J. Trump will meet with the Joint Interagency Task Force South in Key West, Florida, today. He’ll say that to help the task force do its job, he is calling on Congress to close loopholes that allow drugs and criminals to enter our country.

---
|

## Look at what’s happening in America’s heartland
**America was founded because of taxes** , rallying to the cry “No taxation without representation!” So when Americans elected a Washington outsider, Donald J. Trump, to reform government, the most sweeping overhaul of the tax code in American history was a natural place to start.
**Tax cuts are key to the optimism spreading across our heartland**. Today, several Midwest states boast among the lowest unemployment rates in the country. Key industries in America’s interior are thriving, with manufacturers anticipating their fastest wage growth in 17 years. “I ran on ‘tired of being 50th.’ And we’re finally first in all kinds of things,” Gov. Jim Justice (R-WV) told President Trump this month.
**Here’s why: Cutting taxes and red tape isn’t about cutting services**. In fact, it’s the opposite. President Trump is streamlining government to make it work better for the communities who need it most. One recent example is the Administration’s decision to expedite the environmental review process for major infrastructure projects.
[The President’s plan is to expand opportunity in every part of the country. So far, it’s working. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=756a8339d602cd66455ae94c1e9b2b95d9a2decf3cddde3e501c16d75b7758570da5bfd59390579df6e2b3566d74ab71283ace908b80cb70)

---
|

## The legacy of First Lady Barbara Bush
**Barbara Bush was the “rock” of one of America’s most visible families**. The mother of 6 and grandmother of 17 “kept us on our toes and kept us laughing until the end,” former President George W. Bush said this week. “I’m a lucky man that Barbara Bush was my mother.”
**Mrs. Bush’s legacy extends far beyond her role as matriarch**. She served as a trusted adviser to her husband, President George H. W. Bush, and she tirelessly championed the cause of literacy throughout her life. She attended more than 500 literacy events during the Reagan Administration—before she’d even become First Lady of the United States.
**She was also a bipartisan symbol of women’s empowerment**. When she famously wore fake pearls to her husband’s Presidential Inauguration and other White House events, her deputy press secretary quipped it was because “she just really likes them.” Polls showed that Americans loved her down-to-earth, no-nonsense style.
[Barbara Bush put “family and country above all else,” First Lady Melania Trump says. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=756a8339d602cd6619fa44665a3289efcb8128ab83509608b22ca263bde4209b94c934882eabff244edf24062d4429c5385c0bf52d610717)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**President Donald J. Trump and Prime Minister Shinzo Abe of Japan** | April 17, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=756a8339d602cd6602e36059e15d354cdd3e6bc2b9f7f4969ffbb2a2b5fa64a60a355ee21c85d36f36c40a90ad2852b7db888135273744d3) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=756a8339d602cd66b1388ab6e0381a4f79ce5aa993f48ad8067363c42f78dcc6dc7800b738ceacf386f3f9356dae8cafbfa12fa1d552cfad) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4da0c20fe3bf22104e96685f281efe9e7ca1dd9e4e0338c49ee92eb14de643f73206def169a37f7e1ffd2be95dcd1b67d2e80e1d1a293a66a)
---

[ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=4ca3e5c068f84ceeaf2e0b3714d02e42&_e=rHGxdk2Sl8MpxDf_ZGHK8cwSRCgoMDuV2IYBYKdTe_lutW5ZvHdovWXe00E9Pu1CrCaamosovEqvYW5NZrUF1TLPqSVoQ1OvT5TAT37OSZ1Tt2wY9yyGkqcbdHYMADfgvBBakYwvoiiFPzRobsuaX48lKGitKfocolipGGoHGKbnBXv8HxCJbJdqJmx2pyXzoFekFi8IfaIiRW8IJDlq2I_K-VUzv1AYkwIov_JOqJGyw_oaRn5SzRtcit_VpJhyAkKTcJz6_4NIsz_GLxzSxhpukl8cD4dYeX5hweu_8A4uDXCcDTEg_773_HTU5pgi8o2Ab_ijie-UmWpaz66mpPpRP7PAkXRr4_WHj9HmVQfGFUUbdlYCr44Ls7lsGGXyx5NcpGSKpXkS8UX-XTEhwmTKWB9e_LNE7IO3cOuImUE%3D)
**[>> Hear about my commitment to our 6th District Hoosier veterans – watch our new ad now <<](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=4ca3e5c068f84ceeaf2e0b3714d02e42&_e=rHGxdk2Sl8MpxDf_ZGHK8cwSRCgoMDuV2IYBYKdTe_lutW5ZvHdovWXe00E9Pu1CrCaamosovEqvYW5NZrUF1TLPqSVoQ1OvT5TAT37OSZ1Tt2wY9yyGkqcbdHYMADfgvBBakYwvoiiFPzRobsuaX48lKGitKfocolipGGoHGKbnBXv8HxCJbJdqJmx2pyXzoFekFi8IfaIiRW8IJDlq2PG-TvEid_HrBi4-pPksEuYptqvHNqa-vsxYp7dnOtB9uFdnJ-GVwcZTIt9KwoZD3Ta19g8R76ggfZfi8YkkWZwnn26ldbl-nzhvcnsjbkrRCcVWrxjskvRixDnHn1mueYSf6hGa_71VHnGhF-TZhiKQd2NMISRZxIiabi5aq2pqso2Gp4nU9I-y7kQFc09E1_VTaLlFs0coPw19q3QFYjo%3D)**

**Currently, 10% of our veterans are homeless and in desperate need of our help. Homeless veterans often don’t get the healthcare they need and are being devastated by the drug crisis.**

_I took an oath to support and defend this country. As your Congressman, I will support President Trump to ensure the federal government keeps its promise to every veteran._

**[You can help Team Pence right now by taking a moment to SHARE this commercial with your friends, family, and neighbors on Facebook>>>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=4ca3e5c068f84ceeaf2e0b3714d02e42&_e=rHGxdk2Sl8MpxDf_ZGHK8cwSRCgoMDuV2IYBYKdTe_lutW5ZvHdovWXe00E9Pu1CrCaamosovEqvYW5NZrUF1TLPqSVoQ1OvT5TAT37OSZ1Tt2wY9yyGkqcbdHYMADfgvBBakYwvoiiFPzRobsuaX48lKGitKfocolipGGoHGKbnBXv8HxCJbJdqJmx2pyXzoFekFi8IfaIiRW8IJDlq2GnJrAEq5OV4SQjVmAS_SyOSbdJQ1s5ByCT1fe-VM-RTz8nr2_uLfmlKbF7R6jZzl5cVH9EryibZPrLZMdjc6WkUmyrDp1mIU1uorSSTZQH7JdggwasgS_4_UQVQSrviQSpONZQXu0P5ZIu7XH1k7TPtLS-cgsPPEXAL7WL3Q_VgZC1qn--698mftelFhUmNSdzVGzULLA7oRbprXkt_AGg%3D)**

**Primary Election Day is less than 2 weeks away. Team Pence is earning every vote. After all, as a Marine officer, I understand respect is earned, never given.**

I will keep my oath -- _I’m Ready To Serve, Again!_

Semper Fi,
Greg Pence

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: It's disgusting
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Friend, Just weeks after the sound of gunshots rang through the halls of their high school, the students of Marjory Stoneman Douglas began their mission for action. They marched on Tallahassee. They helped organize the March for Our Lives in Washington, D.C. They refuse to let spineless lawmakers, who bow to the gun lobby, get away with doing nothing. These young people are fearless, relentless, and truly inspiring. Republicans, of course, don't see it that way. Probably because they're the ones being called out for their failures. So, what's the response strategy from the far right? _Attack the victims._ Republican candidates and elected officials called Parkland students names and used outrageous slurs. Right-wing media personalities picked on students for everything from grades to college admissions. **It's absolutely disgusting.** It's one thing when extreme Republicans pick on people like me. I chose to run for this job. I chose to take on everything that comes with it. And I can handle attacks if it means standing up for what's right and getting things done. But these students didn't choose to get shot at. They didn't choose to see their friends die. But what they did choose is to take this tragedy and make something of it. They have the courage to fight for change. And today, we can all choose to stand beside them. [_**The students of Parkland won't back down because of right-wing bullies, and we can't either. Let's continue to build our grassroots movement in support of common-sense gun safety legislation. Add your name to mine.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ffb/622b7b5b/1a4f6fe7/307b88b2/3616885456/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180409m") I'm not only standing with Parkland students -- I'm taking action. The same prohibitions that bar an individual from buying a gun also prohibit ammunition purchases, but there is no verification. I have a plan to require the same background checks to buy a firearm for anyone buying ammunition. It will help to keep bullets out of the hands of those who shouldn't have them. And while no single law will stop every tragedy, this is exactly the kind of common-sense idea that could make a big difference. You can take action today too, team. [_**Stand with Parkland. Add your name to build our grassroots movement.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ffb/622b7b5b/1a4f6fe7/307b88b2/3616885456/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180409m") Thank you. Debbie
---

|
---

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: DC is buzzing with rumors of the next retirement
body:
Peter,
Right now, Washington, DC is buzzing with rumors of the forthcoming retirement of several Supreme Court justices.
Justice Anthony Kennedy, 81, is said to desire a retirement soon. Justice Ruth Bader Ginsberg is 85. And later this year Justice Breyer will be 80.
I believe that when a vacancy opens, President Trump will nominate a jurist whose commitment is to the Constitution as it was written by our Founding Fathers.
[The true battleground will be in the Senate, where 51 members must approve the President’s nominee. The Left’s opposition is so strong, so unhinged, so well funded that we cannot afford to wait until the “day after” the vacancy occurs to act. We must get to work NOW! We need your help.](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/p180419apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180419apl01ndb&n=1)
**The next Supreme Court appointment will be extremely critical to people of faith.**
Peter, I don’t have to tell you, but for good or for bad, the Supreme Court sits atop what has become the most powerful branch of our government, the federal judiciary.
The Supreme Court single-handedly imposed abortion in 1973.
In 2015, the Supreme Court on a 5-4 vote overturned the will of the people to recognize marriage as a union between one man and one woman, canceling 5,000 years of religious tradition.
And today, the nine jurists on the Court are deciding if businessmen and women can choose, based on the convictions of their faith, to cater, photograph, or clothe participants in same-sex “marriage” ceremonies. Next, ordering ordained clergy to officiate is almost certain.
A future Supreme Court may very well overturn these horrible decisions! Adding an additional conservative, pro-faith jurist to the court can make that a real possibility.
**Ultimately, the direction of the** **Supreme Court hinges on the midterm elections.**
**After analyzing the tactics of the left and the “resist” movement, we developed a strategy to educate and mobilize pro-family, pro-faith voters.**
The mathematics of this nomination is simple and it will be decided in this year’s midterm elections. If we can persuade a majority of the “swing” Senators to vote “yes” on President Trump’s future Supreme Court nomination, constitutional and Christian values will win.
There are eight Senate seats upon which this battle is likely to hinge. The representatives below currently hold these important seats.
* Arizona Senator Jeff Flake (R) (not seeking re-election)
* Indiana Senator Joe Donnelly (D)
* Missouri Senator Claire McCaskill (D)
* Montana Senator Jon Tester(D)
* Nevada Senator Dean Heller (R)
* North Dakota Senator Heidi Heitkamp (D)
* Tennessee Senator Bob Corker (R)
* West Virginia Senator Joe Manchin (D)

**Our task at My Faith Votes is to reach out, educate and mobilize a force of like-minded voters beginning in these seven crucial states, to elect Senators who will vote in alliance with Judeo-Christian values.**
This is not a small task. You’ve seen the left is already hard at work; mobilizing in record numbers to do everything they can to take the Senate.
If this happens, the Christian values of life, religious liberty, and marriage – will not only be disregarded in the Senate for the next six years, but they could be at risk of receiving protection by the Supreme Court for decades to come.
If we want to see the Supreme Court protect our God-given principles we must first elect a God-fearing Senate. Christian voters can make this happen, but they must first be reached.
[Our education and mobilization budget for this campaign – if we can raise this critical amount, is $500,000. And I believe our combination of prayer and action can make the difference in every one of these targeted states!](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/p180419apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180419apl01ndb&n=2)
[](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/p180419apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180419apl01ndb&n=3)
I hope I can count on you to help us. Any amount you can contribute will play a valuable part in defending our Christian principles.
God Bless you.
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180419apl01ndb&n=4)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180419apl01ndb&n=5).

| | Friend, Did you see Donna's note below? At the beginning of her campaign, Donna made a promise to she would not accept donations from big developers and has kept that promise. There is nothing our county can't achieve when we work together. Rahsheim Wright Donna for Prince George's Campaign Manager **\---Begin Forwarded Message---** Friend,
Last Thursday, I had the opportunity talk with Fox 5 DC about their report on Dr. Kevin Maxwell's secret pay raises for executive leadership at Prince George's County Public Schools. While the salary amounts reported are on par with the region, raises are usually given on par with teachers publicly. Unfortunately, that did not happen here. From big payoffs to school board members who oversee hiring decisions to grade reporting scandals, our current education leaders are enabling an unethical culture in our school system. If elected as Prince George's County Executive, I will advocate for restoring our elected school board and raising teacher pay. I can't make this vision a reality without you. [Will you support my campaign for County Executive with a donation of $5 or more? ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff1c/767134fb/5c90add5/43383e7e/1517725018/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pgschools#") I'm ready to clean house--and I know so many of you are, too. I'm the only candidate in this race who has shown that I can't be bought by anyone. I'll bring that same approach to cleaning up our school system. I'll fight to make it more transparent and I'll fight to invest in our teachers and students, but I can't fight alone. [I hope you will support my campaign by chipping in $5 or more. ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff1c/767134fb/5c90add5/43383e7e/1517725018/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pgschools#") Thank you again for your continued support.
